mapper.select: select f.id, f.object_type, f.name, f.api_name, f.title, f.type, f.biz_type, f.expression, f.trigger_expr, f.virtual_expr, f.write_back_expr::text as write_back_expr, f.refer_info::text as refer_info, t.app_name from baseapp_object_field f left join baseapp_object_type t on f.object_type = t.name where f.object_type = #{objectType}

select f.id, f.object_type, f.name, f.api_name, f.title, f.type, f.biz_type, f.expression, f.trigger_expr, f.virtual_expr, f.write_back_expr::text as write_back_expr, f.refer_info::text as refer_info, t.app_name from baseapp_object_field f left join baseapp_object_type t on f.object_type = t.name where f.write_back_expr is not null

select f.id, f.object_type, f.name, f.api_name, f.title, f.type, f.biz_type, f.expression, f.trigger_expr, f.virtual_expr, f.write_back_expr::text as write_back_expr, f.refer_info::text as refer_info, t.app_name from baseapp_object_field f left join baseapp_object_type t on f.object_type = t.name

select m.content::text from baseapp_system_metadata m join baseapp_object_type t on m.name = t.name where m.name like '%View%' and m.is_deleted = false and m.type_id = 'MetaType.entity' and coalesce(t.type, '') = 'bill' and lower(coalesce(t.app_name, '')) in ('arap','purchase', 'sales', 'contract')
select app_name from baseapp_object_type where name = #{objectType} limit 1
select name from baseapp_object_type where coalesce(type,'') = 'bill'

SELECT f.id, f.object_type, f.name, f.api_name, f.title, f.type, f.biz_type, f.refer_info::text as refer_info, t.app_name FROM baseapp_object_field f LEFT JOIN baseapp_object_type t ON f.object_type = t.name WHERE f.refer_info IS NOT NULL AND f.refer_info::text != 'null' AND jsonb_typeof(f.refer_info->'referEntities') = 'array' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM jsonb_array_elements(f.refer_info->'referEntities') AS elem WHERE elem->>'referEntityName' = #{entityName} ) ORDER BY f.object_type, f.name
